name: AHG ResourceSync Plugin
description: ResourceSync 1.1 (NISO Z39.99-2017) Source endpoints: Source Description, Capability List, Resource List and Change List as sitemap-formatted XML. Mirrors the OAI-PMH publication filter so aggregators see the same record + tombstone set across both federation surfaces.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Change List (recent updates + tombstones, configurable horizon)
OAI-PMH publication filter parity (status type_id=158 / status_id=160)
Tombstones sourced from oai_deleted_record (shared with OAI-PMH)
Sitemap-formatted XML with rs:md / rs:ln ResourceSync extension
